channel.title: Welcome to Tony's Pizza on Tony's Pizza
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to Tony's Pizza on Tony's Pizza

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Our Story

Tony’s Pizza started in 1995 when Antonio “Tony” Rossi brought his grandmother’s recipes from Naples to Main Street. What began as a small corner shop has grown into a neighborhood institution—but our commitment to quality has never changed.

What Makes Us Different

  • Wood-fired oven — Our 800°F brick oven gives every pizza that perfect char and crisp crust
  • Fresh daily — Dough made from scratch every morning, never frozen
  • Family recipes — Secret sauces and techniques passed down through generations
  • Local when possible — We source from local farms for seasonal specials

Visit Us

We’re more than a restaurant—we’re a gathering place. Come for the pizza, stay for the atmosphere. Kids are always welcome, and we’re happy to accommodate dietary needs.

item.title: BBQ Chicken
item.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onion, and cilantro. A twist on the classic.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
Get in Touch

We’d love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, want to place an order, or need to book a table for a group, we’re here to help.

Location

Tony’s Pizza
123 Main Street
Your City, ST 12345

Hours

Day Hours
Monday Closed
Tue–Thu 11am – 9pm
Fri–Sat 11am – 10pm
Sunday 12pm – 8pm

Contact Info

  • Phone: (555) 123-4567
  • Email: hello@tonyspizza.example.org

Order Online

Call us to place an order for pickup or delivery. We deliver within a 5-mile radius—free delivery on orders over $25!

item.title: Diavola
item.description: Spicy salami, fresh mozzarella, and chili oil. For those who like it hot.

item.title: Hawaiian
item.description: Ham, pineapple, and mozzarella. Sweet, salty, and surprisingly divisive—but our version wins converts.

item.title: Margherita
item.description: The classic Neapolitan—tomato, fresh mozzarella, basil, and olive oil. Simple perfection.

item.title: Meat Lover
item.description: Pepperoni, sausage, ham, bacon, and meatballs. The ultimate carnivore pizza.

item.title: Pepperoni
item.description: America’s favorite—spicy pepperoni, tomato sauce, and mozzarella. A crowd-pleaser.

item.title: Quattro Formaggi
item.description: Four cheeses—mozzarella, gorgonzola, parmesan, and fontina—on a white base. Rich and creamy.

item.title: Veggie Supreme
item.description: Bell peppers, onions, mushrooms, olives, tomatoes, and spinach. Loaded with fresh vegetables.

item.title: Weekly Special: Truffle Mushroom Pizza
item.description: This week only—creamy truffle sauce, wild mushrooms, and fontina. A luxurious treat.

item.title: 30th Anniversary Celebration
item.description: Join us March 1st as we celebrate three decades of Tony’s Pizza. Specials, live music, and gratitude.

item.title: New: Gluten-Free Crust
item.description: We now offer a certified gluten-free crust on any pizza. Same great taste, made for everyone.
